title: Yuzz
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yuzz''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Yuzzem]] species from [[Ragna III]]. It was a language of growls, roars and mewls,<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> similar to [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]]. In fact, it was considered almost unpronounceable by other [[Species/Legends|species]], except for [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], who could easily learn Yuzz.

Most Yuzzem were fluent in both Yuzz and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language. Unlike Wookiees, Yuzzem were biologically able to speak Basic.

The language had no written form.<ref name="GAW" />

==Notable non-native speakers of Yuzz==
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
